2604.11120.title: Persona Non Grata: Single-Method Safety Evaluation Is Incomplete for Persona-Imbued LLMs
2604.11120.paper_summary: Personality imbuing customizes LLM behavior, but safety evaluations almost always study prompt-based personas alone. We show this is incomplete: prompting and activation steering expose *different*, architecture-dependent vulnerability profiles, and testing with only one method can miss a model's dominant failure mode. Across 5,568 judged conditions on four standard models from three architecture families, persona danger rankings under system prompting are preserved across all architectures ($ρ= 0.71$--$0.96$), but activation-steering vulnerability diverges sharply and cannot be predicted from prompt-side rankings: Llama-3.1-8B is substantially more AS-vulnerable, whereas Gemma-3-27B and Qwen3.5 are more vulnerable to prompting. The most striking illustration of this divergence is the *prosocial persona paradox*: on Llama-3.1-8B, P12 (high conscientiousness + high agreeableness) is among the safest personas under prompting yet becomes the highest-ASR activation-steered persona (ASR ~0.818). This is an inversion robust to coefficient ablation and matched-strength calibration, and replicated on DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-32B. A trait refusal alignment framework, in which conscientiousness is strongly anti-aligned with refusal on Llama-3.1-8B, offers a partial geometric account. Reasoning provides only partial protection: two 32B reasoning models reach 15--18% prompt-side ASR, and activation steering separates them sharply in both baseline susceptibility and persona-specific vulnerability. Heuristic trace diagnostics suggest that the safer model retains stronger policy recall and self-correction behavior, not merely longer reasoning.
2604.11120.paper_summary_zh: 個性化定制使 LLM 行為具有個性，但安全評估幾乎總是僅研究基於提示的人格。我們表明這是不完整的：提示和激活引導暴露出*不同*的、依賴於架構的脆弱性特徵，而僅用一種方法進行測試可能會錯過模型的主要失效模式。在來自三個架構家族的四個標準模型上，對 5,568 種判斷條件的評估中，系統提示下的人格危險排名在所有架構中保持一致（$ρ= 0.71$--$0.96$），但激活引導的脆弱性卻急劇發散，無法從提示側排名中預測：Llama-3.1-8B 在 AS 脆弱性上顯著更高，而 Gemma-3-27B 和 Qwen3.5 則更容易受到提示的影響。這種差異最引人注目的例證是*親社會人格悖論*：在 Llama-3.1-8B 上，P12（高責任感 + 高宜人性）在提示下是最安全的人格之一，但成為了最高 ASR 的激活引導人格（ASR ~0.818）。這是一種對係數消融和匹配強度校準具有穩健性的反轉，並在 DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-32B 上得到了重複。一個特質拒絕對齊框架，其中責任感在 Llama-3.1-8B 上與拒絕強烈反對齊，提供了一個部分幾何解釋。推理僅提供部分保護：兩個 32B 的推理模型在提示側 ASR 上達到 15--18%，而激活引導在基線易感性和人格特定脆弱性上將它們明確區分開來。啟發式痕跡診斷表明，更安全的模型保留了更強的政策回憶和自我修正行為，而不僅僅是更長的推理。
2604.11120.author: Wenkai Li et.al.
2604.11120.authors: Wenkai Li, Fan Yang, Shaunak A. Mehta, Koichi Onoue
